question: Prohibited photography over protected areas is not considered an offence if:

options.text: Only part of the protected area is taken using the photographic equipment on board the UA.
Proven that part of the protected area or whole area photograph taken was not intentionally but due to weather conditions or other unavoidable cause.
There was no photographic equipment on the UA.
The person not the operator of the UA took the picture.

classification_notes: Question tests protected-area photography provisions under the Act.
